workflow_steps.instruction: Ask the agent to shape the work into the narrowest honest Markdown artifact before implementation.

success_criteria: task start prints a bound worktree cd command
the local-only loop runs without requiring server, web, worker, or PostgreSQL services
land-local reports a landed result on the target line
the final workspace returns to clean status

troubleshooting.symptom: task start follows the repository's remote-backed default
troubleshooting.fix: restart the slice with ait task start --local ... when you want a local-only loop

troubleshooting.symptom: root guard warnings appear after task start
troubleshooting.fix: switch into the bound worktree using the printed cd command

troubleshooting.symptom: task intent and implementation drift because Markdown lineage was never synced
troubleshooting.fix: shape the work in Markdown first and run ait plan sync <file-or-dir> before implementation

troubleshooting.symptom: developer starts trying to bootstrap server/web/PostgreSQL for the first local loop
troubleshooting.fix: stay on the local trust-layer path; use runtime/deployment docs only when the task really needs shared surfaces
